channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti underpass Siebert rd SE3, 26th April
item.description:
Four separate graffiti in underpass linking Siebert rd SE3 with Bramshot avenue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramshot Avenue, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti underpass Siebert rd SE3, 26th April
item.description:
Four separate graffiti in underpass linking Siebert rd SE3 with Bramshot avenue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramshot Avenue, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the bin store at side of Leff next to Athelstan block 11-20, 26th April
item.description:
Bagged water, amazon boxes, chair, tv stand shelves

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Lamp Post 5 Hatherley Crescent 25/04/2026 23:30, 26th April
item.description:
Lamp Post 5 Hatherley Crescent 25/04/2026 23:30 out on T junction of Hatherley Crescent and Faraday Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Crescent, Blackfen, Greater London

item.title: Chair, 26th April
item.description:
A large chair /sofa
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Estates)

item.title: Possible abandoned vehicle outside 90 Charlton Road SE77EY, 26th April
item.description:
A blue Kia Niro, VRN EA67 CXV has been parked outside 90 Charlton Road for a number of weeks (exact time not known). It was not even moved for the London Marathon.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flower beds, 26th April
item.description:
Litter everywhere.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing again., 26th April
item.description:
Same problem as last weekend. There were street cleaners in the area but they didn't come onto Myddleton Avenue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Myddleton Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 26th April
item.description:
Please empty. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas bottle, 26th April
item.description:
Some one has dumped a gas bottle and box opposite my house so reporting it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree remove removed hole not filled in several weeks ago, 26th April
item.description:
A tree was removed by the council, but the hole is not filled in with tarmac like all the other ones in the neighbourhood Mega trip hazard seemed to people fall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped clothing etc next to clothes recycling bin, 26th April
item.description:
There is a huge pile of clothes, shoes etc all around the charity recycling bin by the dry cleaners again. I feel sorry for the business owners as they have messes like these in front of their shop every single week. Should the recycling bin be relocated to the carpark on the other side of the train station along with the other recycling units, to prevent this problem maybe?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anti tamper nut missing, 26th April
item.description:
One of the anti tamper fittings has been removed from the chicanes by the bridge and needs replacing. These are supposed to be permanent fixtures to stop asb people removing the nuts etc and using them in catapults at the birds.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken litter bin, 26th April
item.description:
Litter bin is broken and litter is falling out into street by residents housing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76-80, Southwark Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of waste, 26th April
item.description:
As is the case 3x a week, another large fly tipping. The offenders information is on the packaging. There has been no response by the council to take preventive measures such as signage and a camera. The neighbourhood is losing faith.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and bad litter problem, 26th April
item.description:
The area outside the parade of shops as you approach Penge East station (Lennard Rd) was in a terrible state this morning. See photos. The bins are massively overflowing and there are sacks of residential waste that have been torn open and spread all around the street. Could more bins please be installed, or better provision of bins for residents of the flats over the shops?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavily soiled mattress, 26th April
item.description:
Heavily soiled mattress in the walkway between 8-10 Lovel Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reserving space with cones, 26th April
item.description:
This is a public car park space that keeps being blocked by a van owner who does not live here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 181, Ennersdale Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on grey comms box, 26th April
item.description:
There is a yellow tag on top of the grey cabinet between the railway bridges

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Bridge to Windmill Bridge Junction, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daubeney Road fly tipping, 26th April
item.description:
Fly tipping is an ongoing issue at this spot, and the longer it sits here, the more gets piled on top of it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daubeney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
